title: JobPosting
description: A job posting is a public-facing representation of a job requisition published to internal or external career sites for candidate attraction.

id.description: Workday ID (WID) uniquely identifying the job posting

jobRequisition.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

postingSite.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

description.description: Full job posting description including responsibilities
description.example: Strong technical background with 8+ years of experience in distributed systems.

qualifications.example: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience; 5+ years of professional software development.

location.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

currency.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

compensationRange.description: Compensation range displayed on the posting

isActive.description: Whether the posting is currently active

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary posting for the requisition

postedOn.description: Timestamp when the job was posted
